prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Hearts of Wulin / Jianghu inspired wuxia ink-wash atlas for the terrain type continent_archipelago.
Scene/backdrop: one dominant jianghu continent with a large uneven offshore archipelago, mist-covered mountain peaks, bamboo forest valleys, ancient temple complexes, river market towns, hidden sect strongholds, island sword schools, forbidden manual caves, sacred waterfall islands, wandering hero ferry routes and secluded hermit retreats.
Style/medium: high-resolution Chinese ink wash atlas, classical landscape painting style, wuxia martial world aesthetic, flowing chi energy trails, soft mineral colors, calligraphic brush textures, poetic mist and mountain atmosphere.
Composition/framing: tall portrait map; main continent off-center with an irregular archipelago sweeping along the coast in a diagonal arc; islands include tiny hermit islets, reef belts, large monastery islands, crescent chains, misty atolls and karst tower rocks; include subtle compass seal, brushwork border, river and ferry routes, temple icons, sect markers and mountain pass symbols without readable text.
Geography constraints: islands must be irregularly distributed and varied in size and shape, with channels, mist lagoons, reefs, river mouths, atolls, karst islands and broken shores; continental coastline should include peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, curved coasts, deltas, misty estuaries, capes and fragmented cliffs; show snowy sacred peaks, bamboo forests, riverlands, deserts, wetlands, lake basins, tea terraces, karst mountains and spiritual wastelands.
Avoid: uniform island grid, western medieval fantasy, modern satellite image, simple round islands, bright UI, readable labels, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
